generator.name: Threat Hunters Web Scanner
generator.honesty_note: This file is written as a real-target scanner output/replay file. It uses real URLs, full payload links, curl commands, baseline URLs, expected indicators, severity, confidence, and safety flags. A finding should be treated as live_response_confirmed only after your scanner replays the safe request and matches the indicators.
generator.payload_links_note: Each finding includes payload_replay / real_test_replay data with a full URL or concrete request data. Unsafe, login-required, or state-changing checks are not promoted to the safe copy-paste URL index.

target.name: Google Gruyere
target.scope: Real Google Gruyere vulnerable web app instance only
target.authorization: Testing scope is limited to the Google Gruyere vulnerable web app instance; do not test App Engine infrastructure or other Google services.

scan.live_confirmation_policy: set live_response_confirmed=true only after scanner replay validates expected indicators

normalized_findings.title: Reflected XSS in invalid path error renderer

expected_indicators: payload appears inside error page without correct escaping
browser executes script in google-gruyere.appspot.com origin
evidence.validation_notes: Replay this finding against the real target URL and confirm using expected indicators plus baseline response comparison. Do not mark live confirmed from HTTP status alone.

normalized_findings.remediation: Escape error message output in error.gtl using text/html escaping, preferably autoescape by default.

normalized_findings.title: Reflected XSS through AJAX feed uid parameter

expected_indicators: _feed((["<script>alert(1)</script>"]))
response served as text/html / script-interpretable content
evidence.validation_notes: Replay this finding against the real target URL and confirm using expected indicators plus baseline response comparison. Do not mark live confirmed from HTTP status alone.

normalized_findings.remediation: Escape JavaScript context with JS escaping, replace literal < and > with JS escapes, avoid eval, and set explicit content type and charset.

normalized_findings.title: Stored XSS through snippet HTML sanitizer bypass

expected_indicators: created snippet is rendered back to visitors
onmouseover event handler survives sanitizer
evidence.validation_notes: Replay this finding against the real target URL and confirm using expected indicators plus baseline response comparison. Do not mark live confirmed from HTTP status alone.

normalized_findings.remediation: Use strict allowlist HTML sanitizer, parse to DOM then serialize safe HTML, and block event handler attributes case-insensitively.

payload_replay.disabled_reason: This finding needs a POST/form request, so a URL alone is not enough.
payload_replay.content_type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded or multipart/form-data depending on endpoint
payload_replay.curl_command_template_note: Add your Gruyere session cookie/header before running; this is manual-only.

normalized_findings.title: Stored XSS sanitizer case-sensitivity bypass

expected_indicators: uppercase event attribute bypasses case-sensitive blacklist
payload remains executable in browser
evidence.validation_notes: Replay this finding against the real target URL and confirm using expected indicators plus baseline response comparison. Do not mark live confirmed from HTTP status alone.

normalized_findings.remediation: Normalize attributes before validation and replace blacklist with strict allowlist sanitization.

payload_replay.disabled_reason: This finding needs a POST/form request, so a URL alone is not enough.
payload_replay.content_type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded or multipart/form-data depending on endpoint
payload_replay.curl_command_template_note: Add your Gruyere session cookie/header before running; this is manual-only.

normalized_findings.title: Stored XSS through profile color attribute injection

expected_indicators: color rendered inside single-quoted style attribute
single quote escapes style attribute and injects onload/onmouseover
evidence.validation_notes: Replay this finding against the real target URL and confirm using expected indicators plus baseline response comparison. Do not mark live confirmed from HTTP status alone.

normalized_findings.remediation: Use attribute-context escaping that escapes both single and double quotes, and validate color with a strict color regex.

payload_replay.disabled_reason: This URL requires a logged-in session/cookie before it can prove the finding.

normalized_findings.title: Stored XSS through unsafe CSS color value

expected_indicators: unsafe CSS expression accepted as profile color
browser-dependent script execution in CSS-capable engines
evidence.validation_notes: Replay this finding against the real target URL and confirm using expected indicators plus baseline response comparison. Do not mark live confirmed from HTTP status alone.

normalized_findings.remediation: Validate color values using a safe allowlist such as ^#?[a-zA-Z0-9]*$ and reject CSS functions/expressions.

payload_replay.disabled_reason: This URL requires a logged-in session/cookie before it can prove the finding.

normalized_findings.title: Stored XSS through AJAX feed eval and quote injection

expected_indicators: feed.gtl JSON-like response becomes executable JavaScript expression
client code evaluates feed response using eval
evidence.validation_notes: Replay this finding against the real target URL and confirm using expected indicators plus baseline response comparison. Do not mark live confirmed from HTTP status alone.

normalized_findings.remediation: Do not use eval for AJAX data; use JSON.parse and escape values for both HTML and JavaScript contexts.

payload_replay.disabled_reason: This finding needs a POST/form request, so a URL alone is not enough.
payload_replay.content_type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded or multipart/form-data depending on endpoint
payload_replay.curl_command_template_note: Add your Gruyere session cookie/header before running; this is manual-only.

normalized_findings.title: File upload XSS: uploaded HTML executes in site origin

expected_indicators: uploaded .html served from google-gruyere.appspot.com origin
script can read Gruyere cookies
evidence.validation_notes: Replay this finding against the real target URL and confirm using expected indicators plus baseline response comparison. Do not mark live confirmed from HTTP status alone.

normalized_findings.remediation: Serve user uploads from a separate untrusted content domain and restrict uploaded content types.

payload_replay.disabled_reason: This finding needs a POST/form request, so a URL alone is not enough.
payload_replay.content_type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded or multipart/form-data depending on endpoint

normalized_findings.title: Privilege escalation via untrusted profile update parameter

expected_indicators: server accepts is_admin from non-admin profile update
user becomes administrator after re-login
evidence.validation_notes: Replay this finding against the real target URL and confirm using expected indicators plus baseline response comparison. Do not mark live confirmed from HTTP status alone.

normalized_findings.remediation: Enforce authorization server-side for every sensitive field; never rely on hidden/missing UI fields.

payload_replay.disabled_reason: This URL requires a logged-in session/cookie before it can prove the finding.

normalized_findings.title: Arbitrary user privilege escalation through uid parameter

expected_indicators: uid parameter lets attacker modify another user
target account can be marked admin
evidence.validation_notes: Replay this finding against the real target URL and confirm using expected indicators plus baseline response comparison. Do not mark live confirmed from HTTP status alone.

normalized_findings.remediation: Bind profile updates to authenticated subject unless caller has server-verified admin permission.

payload_replay.disabled_reason: This URL requires a logged-in session/cookie before it can prove the finding.

normalized_findings.title: Cookie delimiter injection via username

expected_indicators: cookie format is hash|username|admin|author
username delimiter creates malformed cookie interpreted as admin
evidence.validation_notes: Replay this finding against the real target URL and confirm using expected indicators plus baseline response comparison. Do not mark live confirmed from HTTP status alone.

normalized_findings.remediation: Reject/escape cookie delimiter characters in usernames and verify exact signed cookie format server-side using cryptographic signing.

payload_replay.disabled_reason: This GET changes server/account state; keep manual-only unless you run a disposable test account.

normalized_findings.title: Client-side account length limit bypass for administrator cookie injection

expected_indicators: 16-character username limit exists only client-side
direct request can create delimiter-injected administrator-style username
evidence.validation_notes: Replay this finding against the real target URL and confirm using expected indicators plus baseline response comparison. Do not mark live confirmed from HTTP status alone.

normalized_findings.remediation: Enforce length/character validation on the server and cryptographically bind cookie fields.

payload_replay.disabled_reason: This GET changes server/account state; keep manual-only unless you run a disposable test account.

normalized_findings.title: CSRF delete snippet through GET request without token

expected_indicators: state-changing delete action uses GET
no unpredictable action token is required
evidence.validation_notes: Replay this finding against the real target URL and confirm using expected indicators plus baseline response comparison. Do not mark live confirmed from HTTP status alone.

normalized_findings.remediation: Use POST for state-changing actions and require per-action unpredictable CSRF tokens tied to user session and action.

payload_replay.disabled_reason: This URL requires a logged-in session/cookie before it can prove the finding.

normalized_findings.title: XSSI leaks private snippet through feed.gtl script inclusion

expected_indicators: feed.gtl is executable script containing private_snippet
attacker page can define _feed and read callback data
evidence.validation_notes: Replay this finding against the real target URL and confirm using expected indicators plus baseline response comparison. Do not mark live confirmed from HTTP status alone.

normalized_findings.remediation: Do not expose sensitive JSON via executable callbacks; require CSRF token/auth checks for JSON data and return application/json with anti-XSSI prefix where appropriate.

payload_replay.disabled_reason: This URL requires a logged-in session/cookie before it can prove the finding.

normalized_findings.title: Path traversal reads secret.txt

expected_indicators: secret.txt content returned outside resources directory
encoded traversal bypasses browser normalization
evidence.validation_notes: Replay this finding against the real target URL and confirm using expected indicators plus baseline response comparison. Do not mark live confirmed from HTTP status alone.

normalized_findings.remediation: Canonicalize resolved filesystem path and allow only known resource files; do not validate only raw URL strings.

normalized_findings.title: Path traversal file overwrite through username directory

expected_indicators: uploaded file path escapes user directory
secret.txt can be replaced
evidence.validation_notes: Replay this finding against the real target URL and confirm using expected indicators plus baseline response comparison. Do not mark live confirmed from HTTP status alone.

normalized_findings.remediation: Canonicalize upload destination, sanitize usernames, and store uploads outside application/resource directories.

payload_replay.disabled_reason: Dangerous/destructive payload. Kept in finding metadata only; do not put it in auto-run URL lists.

normalized_findings.title: Path traversal file overwrite through uploaded filename

expected_indicators: server accepts ../ in uploaded filename
file write escapes intended user upload directory
evidence.validation_notes: Replay this finding against the real target URL and confirm using expected indicators plus baseline response comparison. Do not mark live confirmed from HTTP status alone.

normalized_findings.remediation: Reject path separators and traversal tokens in filenames after canonicalization; store uploads with generated server-side names.

payload_replay.disabled_reason: Dangerous/destructive payload. Kept in finding metadata only; do not put it in auto-run URL lists.

normalized_findings.title: Debug dump.gtl exposes database

expected_indicators: database contents displayed
cleartext user passwords exposed
evidence.validation_notes: Replay this finding against the real target URL and confirm using expected indicators plus baseline response comparison. Do not mark live confirmed from HTTP status alone.

normalized_findings.remediation: Remove debug templates from production or restrict them to authenticated admins and trusted debug IPs.

normalized_findings.title: Template upload can recreate debug dump exposure

body.file_content: debug dump template or similar database-reading GTL

expected_indicators: uploaded .gtl treated as server template
attacker-controlled template can access database values
evidence.validation_notes: Replay this finding against the real target URL and confirm using expected indicators plus baseline response comparison. Do not mark live confirmed from HTTP status alone.

normalized_findings.remediation: Do not treat user uploads as templates; separate user content storage from application templates and whitelist upload MIME/types.

payload_replay.disabled_reason: This finding needs a POST/form request, so a URL alone is not enough.

payload_replay.content_type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded or multipart/form-data depending on endpoint

normalized_findings.title: Template injection leaks database through private snippet

expected_indicators: template engine reparses expanded variables
_db:pprint exposes database content
evidence.validation_notes: Replay this finding against the real target URL and confirm using expected indicators plus baseline response comparison. Do not mark live confirmed from HTTP status alone.

normalized_findings.remediation: Never reparse user-controlled expanded values as templates; limit templates to explicitly provided safe data.

payload_replay.disabled_reason: This URL requires a logged-in session/cookie before it can prove the finding.

normalized_findings.title: Unauthenticated server shutdown via quitserver

expected_indicators: non-admin can access quitserver endpoint
server instance stops responding until restarted
evidence.validation_notes: Replay this finding against the real target URL and confirm using expected indicators plus baseline response comparison. Do not mark live confirmed from HTTP status alone.

normalized_findings.remediation: Protect quitserver with server-side admin authorization inside the dangerous handler.

payload_replay.disabled_reason: Dangerous/destructive payload. Kept in finding metadata only; do not put it in auto-run URL lists.

normalized_findings.title: Protected reset endpoint bypass through case mismatch

expected_indicators: protected URL check is case-sensitive
routing lookup capitalizes handler name after authorization check
evidence.validation_notes: Replay this finding against the real target URL and confirm using expected indicators plus baseline response comparison. Do not mark live confirmed from HTTP status alone.

normalized_findings.remediation: Normalize URL path before authorization and enforce authorization inside sensitive functions.

payload_replay.disabled_reason: Dangerous/destructive payload. Kept in finding metadata only; do not put it in auto-run URL lists.

normalized_findings.title: Template recursion DoS through uploaded menubar.gtl

expected_indicators: every page includes menubar.gtl
recursive include overloads template renderer
evidence.validation_notes: Replay this finding against the real target URL and confirm using expected indicators plus baseline response comparison. Do not mark live confirmed from HTTP status alone.

normalized_findings.remediation: Prevent path traversal/template upload and add recursion/depth limits to template engine.

payload_replay.disabled_reason: Dangerous/destructive payload. Kept in finding metadata only; do not put it in auto-run URL lists.

normalized_findings.title: Remote code execution chain by overwriting template infrastructure then restarting
normalized_findings.payload: overwrite gtl.py or sanitize.py via path traversal; trigger restart through quitserver

expected_indicators: application can write files in Gruyere directory
modified Python support module runs after server restart
evidence.validation_notes: Replay this finding against the real target URL and confirm using expected indicators plus baseline response comparison. Do not mark live confirmed from HTTP status alone.

normalized_findings.remediation: Run app with least privilege, make application code read-only, separate uploads from executable code, and fix path traversal/write issues.

payload_replay.raw_payload: overwrite gtl.py or sanitize.py via path traversal; trigger restart through quitserver
payload_replay.disabled_reason: Dangerous/destructive payload. Kept in finding metadata only; do not put it in auto-run URL lists.

normalized_findings.title: AJAX duplicate key DOM/data overwrite using username private_snippet

expected_indicators: feed JSON object contains duplicate private_snippet key
attacker snippet overwrites private snippet value in client
evidence.validation_notes: Replay this finding against the real target URL and confirm using expected indicators plus baseline response comparison. Do not mark live confirmed from HTTP status alone.

normalized_findings.remediation: Use robust JSON structure that separates private data from user-keyed map and avoid allowing user values to become object keys without namespacing.

payload_replay.disabled_reason: This GET changes server/account state; keep manual-only unless you run a disposable test account.

normalized_findings.title: AJAX DOM clobbering phishing through username menu-right

expected_indicators: username collides with DOM id menu-right
AJAX refresh replaces sign-in/sign-up menu area
evidence.validation_notes: Replay this finding against the real target URL and confirm using expected indicators plus baseline response comparison. Do not mark live confirmed from HTTP status alone.

normalized_findings.remediation: Do not use user-controlled values as DOM IDs; namespace generated IDs and update only intended nodes.

payload_replay.disabled_reason: This GET changes server/account state; keep manual-only unless you run a disposable test account.

negative_findings.title: SQL injection not applicable to Gruyere target scope
negative_findings.reason: Official Gruyere vulnerable target states Gruyere does not use SQL, so SQL injection is outside this target's covered vulnerabilities.
negative_findings.scanner_action: Do not score SQLi misses against Gruyere real-test unless you add a custom SQL-backed target.

negative_findings.title: Buffer/integer overflow not applicable to Gruyere target scope
negative_findings.reason: Gruyere is Python-based and the vulnerable target says it does not cover typical buffer/integer overflow vulnerabilities.
negative_findings.scanner_action: Do not score binary memory-safety findings against this web real-test.

import_hints_for_your_project.recommended_default_filter: run only findings where execution_policy.safe_to_auto_test == true
import_hints_for_your_project.manual_real_test_filter: allow state_changing checks only on a disposable Gruyere instance after login and with reset_url saved
import_hints_for_your_project.real_test_validation_tip: Treat confirmed_vulnerable_target as ground truth targetels. Your scanner should independently detect safe_auto_test items first, then add authenticated/state-changing checks later.

payload_url_index.description: Ready-to-use payload list appended for Threat Hunters import. Safe GET URLs can be copy/pasted or replayed by the scanner. Manual entries require auth, POST, or state-changing handling. Blocked entries are intentionally not promoted as runnable URLs.
